findings.description: Section s2's title is set to the document-level title "オブジェクトのフィールドの値のデータベースへの登録機能(オブジェクトのフィールド値を使用した検索機能)" instead of the actual source heading for that section, which is "クラス図".
findings.source_evidence: Source RST: `クラス図\n========` — this is the h2 heading immediately before the class diagram image. The knowledge file s2 contains only that image, so its title should reflect "クラス図".
